title: UTL-X transform.yaml (TransformConfig)
description: Per-transformation config in a bundle: transformations/<name>/transform.yaml. Source of truth: modules/engine/.../config/TransformConfig.kt. The engine itself ignores unknown keys; this schema is stricter to help editing/validation in the IDE (IF04).

strategy.description: Execution strategy. TEMPLATE (alias INTERPRETED) = interpret per message; COPY = pre-parsed AST reused (no per-message reparse); COMPILED = compiled at load (fastest steady-state, one-time startup cost).

validationPolicy.description: Schema validation of inputs/output. OFF/SKIP = none; WARN = log and continue; STRICT = reject on validation failure.

inputs.description: Data input slots. The name binds to $name in the .utlx; schema (optional) is a path to a schema file under the bundle's shared schemas/.

maxConcurrent.description: EF21 back-pressure: 0 = unlimited; >0 = max in-flight executions before the engine returns 503/back-pressures.

maxInputSize.description: Per-transformation max input size, e.g. "100KB", "25MB". Omit to use the engine default.

outputBinding.description: Legacy Dapr output binding name. Prefer output_messaging.

input.description: EF10 messaging INPUT endpoint (singular; distinct from the inputs[] data slots). Maps to a Dapr Service Bus / Event Hub component.

output_messaging.description: EF10 messaging OUTPUT endpoint. Maps to a Dapr Service Bus / Event Hub component.

name.description: Input name; bound as $name in the .utlx.

schema.description: Path to a schema file (e.g. schemas/order.json), relative to the bundle root.
Path to the output schema file, relative to the bundle root.

messagingEndpoint.description: Exactly one of queue / topic / eventhub. The field name is the discriminator (Service Bus queue, Service Bus topic, or Event Hub).

eventhub.description: Event Hub → bindings.azure.eventhubs (pub/sub when consumerGroup is set).

subscription.description: Required for a topic INPUT (Service Bus subscription name).

consumerGroup.description: Optional for an eventhub INPUT; presence triggers pub/sub mode.
